subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-28 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: They [the people of Paris] are like the pitiable worms that dwell in the depths of the earth, unaware of the supernal realm
subcodes.first_line_orig: چون کِرم مهین در قعر زمینند و بیخبر از عالم علیین و جمیع حضار را بتوجه بملکوت ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @purpose; goal of creation, @soul; spirit after death, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
